label: 8951 Definitions

children.heading: Contaminant
children.label: 1 Contaminant
children.text: The term “contaminant” means any physical, chemical, biological, or radiological substance or matter in water.

children.heading: Contaminant of emerging concern; emerging contaminant
children.label: 2 Contaminant of emerging concern; emerging contaminant
A
children.text: for which the Administrator has not promulgated a national primary drinking water regulation; and

children.label: B
children.text: that may have an adverse effect on the health of individuals.

children.heading: Federal research strategy
children.label: 3 Federal research strategy
children.text: The term “Federal research strategy” means the coordinated cross-agency plan for addressing critical research gaps related to detecting, assessing exposure to, and identifying the adverse health effects of emerging contaminants in drinking water developed by the Office of Science and Technology Policy in response to the report of the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate accompanying S. 1662 of the 115th Congress (S. Rept. 115–139).

children.label: i
children.text: identifying appropriate analytical methods for the detection of contaminants;

children.label: ii
children.text: understanding the strengths and limitations of the analytical methods described in clause (i);

children.label: iii
children.text: troubleshooting the analytical methods described in clause (i);

children.label: B
children.text: providing advice on laboratory certification program elements;

children.label: D
children.text: providing training with respect to proper analytical techniques;

children.label: E
children.text: identifying appropriate technology for the treatment of contaminants; and

children.label: i
children.text: the analysis cannot be otherwise obtained in a practicable manner otherwise; and11So in original.1

children.label: ii
children.text: the capability and capacity to perform the analysis is available at a Federal facility.

children.heading: Working Group
children.label: 5 Working Group
children.text: The term “Working Group” means the Working Group established under .section 8952(b)(1) of this title
